fieldValues.value: RFC-012: Discovery Contract and Text Projection
ext:discovery (new), DiscoveryQuery, TextSegment, Text Projection algorithm, conformance fixture, docs/schema/2.0/discovery.json

Defines the portable, implementation-agnostic discovery contract for SRS. Introduces ext:discovery, the DiscoveryQuery structured filter (typeId, typeNamespace, typeName, containerId, tag, lifecycleState, tier, contentMatch), and the Text Projection algorithm (ValueType-driven searchable fields, TextSegment model, NFC + Unicode simple lowercasing normalization). Twelve conformance rules R1-R12 establish exact-match guarantees for structured filters and guaranteed-recall-floor semantics for content matching. Conformance fixture at srs/conformance/discovery/ with 22 scenarios. Invariants I-079 through I-090. Tracked in the-greenman/srs#83.
